name: Your Family Entertainment AG
summary: Your Family Entertainment AG produces and distributes children and family programs worldwide. The company also operates pay-TV kids channel under the Fix&Foxi name; and free-to-air kids channel under the RiC name; and various mobile TV streams and digital channels. Its library includes approximately 3,500 half-hour programs. Your Family Entertainment AG has a strategic partnership with Ocilion Iptv Technologies Gmbh to develop content in the kids space. The company was formerly known as RTV Family Entertainment AG. Your Family Entertainment AG is headquartered in Munich, Germany. Your Family Entertainment AG is a subsidiary of F&M Film und Medien Beteiligungs GMBH.
